title: chore(deps): update dependency postcss-loader to v2.1.6

### [`v2.1.6`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/postcss-loader/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​300httpsgithubcompostcsspostcss-loadercomparev216v300-2018-08-08)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/postcss-loader/compare/v2.1.5...v2.1.6)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **index:** add ast version (`meta.ast`) ([f34954f](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/postcss-loader/commit/f34954f))
-   **index:** emit `warnings` as an instance of `{Error}` ([8ac6fb5](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/postcss-loader/commit/8ac6fb5))
-   **options:** improved `ValidationError` messages ([549ea08](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/postcss-loader/commit/549ea08))

##### Chores

-   **package:** update `postcss` v6.0.0...7.0.0 (`dependencies`) ([#​375](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/postcss-loader/issues/375)) ([daa0da8](https://renovatebot.com/gh/postcss/postcss-loader/commit/daa0da8))

##### BREAKING CHANGES

-   **package:** requires `node >= v6.0.0`
